message:
fix: resolve Dolt test failures - epic hang, stale SQL, ready filters, timestamps

- Fix GetEpicsEligibleForClosure connection pool deadlock: collect IDs
  first then close rows before calling GetIssue (MaxOpenConns=1 pattern)
- Rewrite epic query using JOINs + GROUP BY instead of correlated
  subqueries with HAVING-without-GROUP-BY (hung indefinitely in Dolt)
- Return all epics with children, not just eligible ones (matches test
  expectations - callers check EligibleForClose flag)
- Convert stale_test.go from SQLite datetime() to MySQL DATE_SUB/DATE_ADD
- Fix create_test.go timestamp tests to use UTC+truncated times for
  reliable Dolt round-trip comparison
- Add Status filter to GetReadyWork (was hardcoded to 'open', now
  defaults to open+in_progress matching memory storage)
- Add Unassigned filter to GetReadyWork
- Add defer_until exclusion to GetReadyWork (excludes future-deferred
  issues by default unless IncludeDeferred is set)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
